sprints.title: AgentForge v4.7 — Audit-Driven Dashboard: Data First, UI Second

items.title: Unified SQLite Audit Schema
items.description: Design and implement a single SQLite schema that subsumes SessionRecord, FeedbackEntry, TaskOutcome, PromotionEvent. Tables: sessions, feedback, task_outcomes, promotions, agent_costs, agent_autonomy. All tables have indexed created_at for time-series queries. Include parentSessionId and delegationDepth columns on sessions for delegation chain drill-down.

items.title: SqliteAdapter — Unified Data Access Layer
items.description: Implement SqliteAdapter class that satisfies the FeedbackFileAdapter and FlywheelFileAdapter interfaces. Drop-in replacement for all existing file-based adapters. Full CRUD for sessions, feedback, task outcomes, promotions. Read-only query methods for analytics. Connection pooling and WAL mode for concurrent access.

items.title: EventCollector Middleware
items.description: New EventCollector module that taps the existing EventBus. Listens for session-start, session-end, feedback-submitted, task-complete, cost-incurred, autonomy-change events. Writes structured records to SQLite via SqliteAdapter in real-time. Includes batch insert optimization for high-throughput scenarios.

items.title: Fastify Server Scaffold
items.description: HTTP server setup: Fastify with TypeScript, static file serving for /app, CORS for local dev, health check at /api/v1/health, graceful shutdown. npm start script launches server. Structured logging with pino.

items.title: REST API Endpoints
items.description: Implement GET /api/v1/sessions (paginated, filterable by agent, status, date range), GET /api/v1/sessions/:id (full detail with delegation chain), GET /api/v1/costs (aggregated by model, agent, time period), GET /api/v1/agents (list with stats), GET /api/v1/agents/:id (profile with run history). All endpoints return consistent JSON envelope: { data, meta: { page, limit, total } }.

items.title: SSE Endpoint /api/v1/stream
items.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint broadcasting new audit events in real-time. Event types: session-started, session-completed, cost-update, anomaly-detected. Client connection registry with cleanup on disconnect. Heartbeat every 30s. Backpressure: drop oldest if client buffer > 100 events.

items.title: Delegation Chain Data Model
items.description: Add parentSessionId (nullable foreign key to sessions.id) and delegationDepth (integer, default 0) to sessions table. Index on parentSessionId for fast tree queries. Query helper: getSessionTree(rootId) returns full delegation chain. Validates no circular references.

items.title: Persistent Autonomy Tier State
items.description: Migrate AutonomyGovernor state to agent_autonomy SQLite table. Columns: agentId, currentTier, promotedAt, demotedAt, reason, sessionCount, successRate. Survives process restarts. AutonomyGovernor reads from DB on startup, writes on tier change.

items.title: Audit Log Page /runs
items.description: Full-page data table showing all session runs. Columns: timestamp, agent, task summary, status, cost, duration, delegation depth. Filter bar: agent dropdown, status toggle, date range picker. Pagination with page size selector. Click row to navigate to /runs/:id. Loading skeleton on initial fetch. Empty state when no data.

items.title: Session Detail Page /runs/:id
items.description: Full session detail view. Tabs: Overview (input/output, timing, cost), Delegation Chain (tree visualization of parent/child sessions), Cost Breakdown (model usage, token counts). Sidebar with agent info and quick stats. Back button returns to /runs with scroll position preserved.

items.title: SPA Client-Side Routing
items.description: Replace anchor-scroll navigation with proper History API routing. Routes: / (Command Center), /runs (Audit Log), /runs/:id (Session Detail), /agents/:id (Agent Profile), /cost (Cost Analytics). Server returns index.html for all routes. Active nav highlighting. Browser back/forward works correctly.

items.title: SSE Client Integration
items.description: Replace all setInterval polling with native EventSource. Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 30s). Connection status indicator in header: green dot = connected, yellow = reconnecting, red = disconnected. Incoming events dispatch to active page components.

items.title: Empty States and Loading Skeletons
items.description: Every data-dependent section gets: (1) loading skeleton shown during fetch, (2) empty state with helpful message when no data exists, (3) error state with retry button on fetch failure. Remove all hardcoded placeholder data. Remove all 'Refreshing in Ns' text.

items.title: Real-Time Cost Anomaly Detection
items.description: Rolling per-agent cost tracker: maintain mean and standard deviation over trailing 50 sessions. Flag any session costing > mean + 2*stddev. Emit anomaly-detected event via EventBus (picked up by EventCollector and SSE). Dashboard shows alert banner for active anomalies.

items.title: Agent Profile Page /agents/:id
items.description: Agent detail view: name, model tier, role description, autonomy tier. Stats cards: total runs, success rate, avg cost, avg duration. Run history table (last 50 sessions, link to /runs/:id). Cost trend sparkline (SVG). Delegation graph showing who this agent delegates to and who delegates to it.

items.title: Command Center Page /
items.description: Top KPI bar: total sessions, active agents, total spend, success rate. Live activity feed showing real-time events via SSE. Currently-running agent cards with elapsed time. Replace existing dashboard landing entirely. All data from API — zero hardcoded values.

items.title: Cost Analytics Page /cost
items.description: Spend trend line chart (daily/weekly/monthly toggle). Model breakdown donut chart (Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku). Per-agent cost table sorted by total spend. Budget burn rate indicator. All charts built with raw SVG, responsive via viewBox.

items.title: Data Analyst First Queries
items.description: Data Analyst agent produces initial report suite: (1) Total spend by sprint, (2) Top 10 most expensive agents, (3) Success rate by model tier, (4) Cost trend week-over-week, (5) Delegation depth distribution. Reports saved to .agentforge/reports/.

items.title: npm start Script
items.description: Single command 'npm start' launches Fastify server, serves static dashboard files, opens browser to localhost. Scripts in package.json: start, dev (with watch), build. README updated with quickstart.

items.title: JSON to SQLite Migration Script
items.description: One-time migration script: reads all existing .agentforge/sessions/*.json files and .agentforge/feedback/*.md files, parses them, inserts into the new SQLite audit database. Idempotent — safe to run multiple times. Reports: N sessions migrated, N feedback entries, N skipped (already exists).

items.title: v4.7 Version Bump
items.description: Update version to 0.4.7 in: package.json, plugin.json, dashboard version badge, CHANGELOG. Tag release.

phase1.name: Data Foundation
phase1.gate: All P0 items complete and tested. SQLite schema operational, EventCollector writing real-time data, REST API returning real session data, SSE endpoint broadcasting events. Minimum 100 new tests passing for data layer.

phase2.name: Audit Log + Core UI
phase2.gate: Audit Log page renders real data. Session Detail page shows full input/output. SPA routing works with deep links. SSE replaces all polling. No hardcoded data anywhere.

phase3.name: Profiles + Intelligence
phase3.gate: All 5 SPA pages functional. Data Analyst produces first reports. npm start works end-to-end.

successCriteria: All Phase 1 items complete and tested before any Phase 2 work begins
Audit Log page shows ONLY real session data — zero hardcoded values
Clicking any session row opens full input/output in Session Detail page
SPA routing: all 5 pages accessible via direct URL and client-side navigation
SSE replaces all polling — no setInterval or 'Refreshing in Ns' text anywhere
100+ new tests for SQLite layer, EventCollector, REST API, SSE
Zero stale sprint data visible in any dashboard section
Data Analyst agent produces at least 5 structured reports from real data
npm start launches server and serves dashboard in one command

newHires.rationale: Ad-hoc query capability against audit database. Answers CTO/CFO questions without manual SQL. Produces structured reports for investor visibility.
Dedicated API surface owner. Fastify routing, SSE channels, and API contracts are complex enough to warrant a specialist rather than overloading the general coder.
BLOCKING for frontend work. The existing frontend-dev lacks specialization for component-system-level SPA buildout. UI engineer owns CSS architecture, SSE client, and SVG visualization.

risks.risk: SQLite concurrent write contention under 20+ parallel agents
risks.mitigation: WAL mode + connection pooling. Load test with 20 concurrent writers in Phase 1.

risks.risk: SSE backpressure under high event volume
risks.mitigation: Client buffer cap at 100 events, drop oldest. Load test before Phase 2 gate.

risks.risk: Migration script data loss for malformed session JSON
risks.mitigation: Dry-run mode first, skip malformed with warnings, idempotent re-run.

risks.risk: SPA routing conflicts with Fastify static file serving
risks.mitigation: Catch-all route returns index.html for non-API paths. Test deep links early.
